alt: Archerfish positioned just below the water surface, tilting its sharp snout upward to target overhanging insects
caption: They are legendary marksmen, forming a specialized tube with their tongue and palate to shoot lethal streams of water at overhanging insects.
acquisitionNotes: Curated diet aiming posture photograph showcasing surface target alignment. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/02/Toxotes_jaculatrix_%28banded_archerfish%29_4_%2815533393159%29.jpg
